subcodes.first_line: O ye Afnan of the divine Tree of the All-Merciful! Your letter dated 7 Rabí'u'l-Avval 339 hath been received, but [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الافنان للشجره الرحمانیه نامه شما بتاریخ ۷ ربیع الاول ۳۳۹ وصول یافت ولی
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @growth of the Cause, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
